command: echo '=== Today EA log ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/20260226.log' 2>&1 | tr -d '\0' | tail -40 && echo '=== Terminal log (today) ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "File: $TLOG" && tail -20 "$TLOG" 2>&1 | tr -d '\0' && echo '=== Account info ===' && cat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Files/PropFirmBot/status.json' 2>&1 | head -20
